title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness on the brain: a review of structural and functional MRI findings in

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Mindfulness, on, the, brain:, a.

**Mindfulness on the brain: areview of structural and functional MRI findings in mindfulness-based stress reduction.** — Eur J Radiol. PMID: 41422646. DOI: 10.1016/j.ejrad.2025.112619. Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction (MBSR) is an evidence-based program that integrates meditation, bodily awareness, and yoga to manage stress and reduce anxiety. Neuroimaging studies suggest that MBSR modulates brain networks involved in emotion regulation, self-awareness, and attention, though findings remain inconsistent. Structural and functional MRI (fMRI) have been used to investigate these effects, focusing on default mode, salience, limbic, and central executive networks. To synthesize M
